name: Eventbrite, Inc.
description: Eventbrite, Inc. operates a self-service ticketing and experience technology platform that connects event creators with attendees worldwide. The company's platform integrates developer tools, planning and promotion resources, ticket sales, and live event management capabilities. It enables creators to plan, promote, and produce live events, as well as sell tickets, manage registrations, and analyze event performance. Eventbrite serves creators ranging from individual organizers to large-scale festivals, music venues, and professional conferences.
